hypothesis: If scientific LLM tasks are made more aligned to the provided tools (via higher task–tool embedding similarity, more comprehensive tool descriptions, and task decomposition/hypothesis generation), then agent performance (pass@5 and success rate) will improve more than from switching the agent framework (ReAct vs tool-calling) or base LLM (Claude-3.5 vs GPT-4o), because alignment enhances correct tool selection and action sequencing.
